description: A cropped screenshot of a Department of Labor news-release web page on a plain white background, with no added graphics, photos, seals, or styling. Black serif text reads a small 'News Release' kicker, then a large all-caps headline 'US DEPARTMENT OF LABOR LAUNCHES PROJECT FIREWALL TO PROTECT AMERICA'S HIGHLY SKILLED WORKFORCE,' followed by an italic subhead 'H-1B enforcement initiative aims to protect American jobs through federal agency partnerships.' A faint scrollbar is visible at right. The tweet text reads 'Highly-skilled jobs should go to AMERICANS FIRST!' and references Project Firewall and 'end H-1B abuse.' It is a document/webpage screenshot.
notable_text: US DEPARTMENT OF LABOR LAUNCHES PROJECT FIREWALL TO PROTECT AMERICA'S HIGHLY SKILLED WORKFORCE; H-1B enforcement initiative
